reviews.author: Arikka Von
reviews.text: Landon and his team did a phenomenal job on my new roof. Landon was clear about the options and provided regular updates. The crew moved so fast and with expertise. They addressed rot and slumps on the roof that were keeping me up at night. It’s such a relief to have a new roof. Thanks, Landon!

reviews.author: LeeAndra Jones
reviews.text: Great business to work with. Got the job done in one day! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Yonghong Xu
reviews.text: Well done. Great work.

reviews.author: Marie Conroe
reviews.text: Frame Restoration did an excellent job replacing our casitas roof in only one day. The crew was very efficient, respectful, and clean. I highly recommended this company to anyone needing a new roof, as their work is of high quality and they are trustworthy people.

reviews.author: Coach Sis
reviews.text: Landon was top notch.  He made everything easy and checked in with me along the way for a total roof replacement I needed done.  I cant say enough about the job they did for my moms house.  She needed a new roof badly.  Thank you for being a honest and fair roofing contractor who lived up to every inch of what was promised.

reviews.author: Arianne Kaspar
reviews.text: Landon was amazing! Most of the roofers I called told me they had no idea why my roof was leaking, that I should just replace my roof, and then give me an exorbitant price. Landon was the first one to sound knowledgeable about roofs and how to fix leaks. He is also very reasonable in the prices that he charges. I will definitely go back to him again.

reviews.author: Timothy Kaspar
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about Landon and his roofing company. I have had a persistent roof leak for several years that was extremely difficult to locate. I had two other roofing companies look at it previously and neither could find the source. Both simply recommended replacing the entire roof, which would have been very expensive and did not sit right with me.

Landon offered to take a look and approached the problem completely differently. He sent a crew out to carefully patch all of the most likely problem areas instead of pushing a full replacement. Even more impressive, Landon later came by personally to inspect the work and make sure everything had been done correctly.

He took the time to walk me through what he found, explained the reasoning behind the repairs, and answered my questions patiently and clearly. Throughout the entire process he was kind, professional, and genuinely focused on solving the problem the right way.

This was excellent value, honest work, and outstanding service. It is rare to find someone who combines skill, integrity, and personal care like this. I would absolutely recommend Landon to anyone needing roofing work and would not hesitate to use him again.

reviews.author: Sam Thornton
reviews.text:
Working with Landon was a breeze. He was knowledgeable and provided me with excellent advice on the best options for our new roof. He even took the time to look into the possibility of submitting an insurance claim but was honest in advising against it for our particular situation, which I really appreciated. He never pressured me into anything and was quick to respond to any questions I had throughout the process.

His pricing came in at just over a third of a bid we received from another company. The crew did excellent work, completed our roof in a single day, and left the property clean afterward. He also provided a 10-year workmanship warranty. I highly recommend Frame Restoration to anyone in need of a new roof.

reviews.author: Sydney
reviews.text: Travis and his team were an absolute dream to work with. They were very knowledgeable about insurance claims, provided thorough and transparent quotes, and completed the work quickly. Everyone was polite, professional, and left the property spotless. Great job on my roof.

reviews.author: Travis Martinez
reviews.text: “Outstanding communication, professional from start to finish, and incredibly friendly and honest. The work was top-notch and completed in a timely manner. I highly recommend this crew—they earned every one of these five stars.”

reviews.author: Harold Wilson
reviews.text: The people at Frame are first class!!! Helped us through our roofing project every step of the way!!

reviews.author: Thomas Hansen
reviews.text: Great experience all around.  Landon made the whole process smooth and easy.  Excellent communication, very fair and just great to work with.  I would highly recommend Frame Restoration to anyone looking for their services!

reviews.author: Preston Fairbourn
reviews.text:
I thought getting a new roof was going to be such a hassle after a windstorm came through and damaged quite a few shingles and left my roof in rough shape. Travis over at Frame Resoration made it super simple!

He helped me file my insurance claim. He talked to the insurance adjuster when they came to look at my roof. Got my claim approved and installed the new roof all within a week and a half.

Travis was very professional, fast, and I am very happy with the quality.

reviews.author: Cherie Rekoutis
reviews.text: Landon replaced our roof and my moms roof. I am very pleased with his workmanship. I would highly recommend him.

reviews.author: Rick Rekoutis
reviews.text: Landon is great to work with. He has replaced two roofs for me and does top notch work. He should be your first call if you need a roofer.

reviews.author: Liz Potts
reviews.text: Very thankful Landon showed up at the neighbors. He fixed my leak and didn’t even charge me. So thankful!!

reviews.author: Emily Madsen
reviews.text: These guys are legit. Easy to communicate with, honest, and do great work. Win.

reviews.author: Michael Henderson
reviews.text: Amazing customer service and great price. We were in need and they came through!

reviews.author: Chris Chatzis
reviews.text: High quality workmanship by his crew, cleaned up every nail garbage. Communicated throughout the process and made sure we were happy before he got paid.

reviews.author: Stephen Tolpinrud
reviews.text: Landon, the owner, is a pleasure to work with. He’s forthright, a good communicator, and is fair with pricing. Frame Restoration re-roofed 2 of our buildings and the final product looks great. Plus, the work was done efficiently and cleanly - my yard and gardens look like they did before we re-roofed. I highly recommend this company for any roofing needs you might have.
